## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt` and `go vet` clean
- [ ] No new dependencies (or: discussed and justified above)
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`) per DCO — see CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] JSON envelope shapes unchanged (or: version-bumped with migration note)
